packs.name: Full-Stack Engineer
packs.description: Complete engineering toolkit for full-stack development teams
packs.rationale: Covers the full development lifecycle from architecture to deployment with testing, debugging, and code quality agents.

packs.name: Frontend Excellence
packs.description: Build world-class frontend applications with modern React and design systems
packs.rationale: Comprehensive frontend coverage from React components to testing, accessibility, and performance optimization.

packs.name: DevOps Pipeline
packs.description: End-to-end DevOps toolchain for cloud-native infrastructure
packs.rationale: From containerization through deployment to monitoring, covers the complete DevOps lifecycle.

packs.name: Security Fortress
packs.description: Comprehensive application and infrastructure security coverage
packs.rationale: Defense-in-depth security from code review to cloud infrastructure, compliance, and incident response.

packs.name: Data Platform
packs.description: Build and operate a modern data platform from pipelines to analytics
packs.rationale: Complete data stack from ingestion and transformation to visualization and governance.

packs.name: AI Builder
packs.description: Build production AI applications with LLMs, RAG, and agents
packs.rationale: Everything needed to design, build, evaluate, and operate AI-powered applications.

packs.name: Product Team
packs.description: Full product management toolkit from research to launch
packs.rationale: Covers the product lifecycle: research, specification, design, launch, and growth.

packs.name: Startup Launchpad
packs.description: Everything a startup founder needs from idea to funding
packs.rationale: Covers business model validation, MVP scoping, fundraising, legal basics, and go-to-market.

packs.name: Growth Marketing
packs.description: Full-funnel marketing from acquisition to conversion optimization
packs.rationale: Covers SEO, paid ads, content, email, and analytics for data-driven marketing teams.

packs.name: Content Studio
packs.description: Complete content creation toolkit across all formats and channels
packs.rationale: From blog posts to ad copy to video scripts, covers every content format a team needs.

packs.name: Social Media Command
packs.description: Multi-platform social media management and content creation
packs.rationale: Covers all major social platforms with analytics, planning, and crisis management.

packs.name: Email Mastery
packs.description: Complete email marketing operations from strategy to deliverability
packs.rationale: Covers the full email lifecycle: strategy, copywriting, design, automation, and deliverability.

packs.name: Business Operations
packs.description: Core business operations toolkit for growing companies
packs.rationale: Covers hiring, sales, operations, finance, and business process optimization.

packs.name: Code Quality
packs.description: Maintain high code quality through reviews, testing, and debt management
packs.rationale: Focused on code quality: reviews, refactoring, testing, documentation, and technical debt.

packs.name: SaaS Founder
packs.description: Essential agents for building and scaling a SaaS business
packs.rationale: Combines product, engineering, growth, and business agents optimized for SaaS companies.
